change.invariant: An organism-derived memory write requires Luna identity, an exact source anchor, complete selected context with zero unread bytes, fresh source status, and a selected independent falsifier.
change.failure_preservation: pending or failed independent falsifiers remain admissible only as non-verified receipts; verified requires an independent pass. No failed record is rewritten.

measurement.regression: npm test: 68 passed, 0 failed; circulation, fact-extractor, provider, and continuity suites passed

recursive_gain: Routing-facing memory can no longer admit a model-produced receipt whose source freshness, byte loss, provenance, or falsifier independence is merely asserted.
new_blind_spot: The independent-holdout selector is structurally required but this repository does not yet execute a separate holdout grader for it.
next_falsifier: Run a generator/grader-separated holdout that can mark holdout:independent-source pass or fail from bytes not selected by the model, then verify failed packets remain queryable and unverified.
